mechanics.excerpt: Be careful not t0 overuse Perception Checks, however; Or they will bog down the flow of play: As with everything else, resort t0 game mechanics only when Ine outcome is uncertain_ PILOTINO BUBBKILLB TABLE Aerodyno (Aero): Aerospace fighters DropShips and spacecraft with an aerodyne configuration_ Alrcralt: Conventional fixed-wing aircraft, be it jet or prop driven: VTOL: Conventional rotary-wing aircraft 'Mech: Two-legged humanoid" BattleMechs _ Quad: Four-legged quad BattleMechs PILOTING" The Piloting Subskills cover the operation of the various vehicles of the thirty first century; from simple ground cars to the mighty BattleMech; Piloting Skill Checks are required when character attempts difficult or dangerous maneuver: Failure indicates the character has lost control of the vehicle and will crash (or fall in the case of BattleMechs).
